title: Weekly Token Scam Intelligence Brief - Feb 22-27, 2026
summary: This week saw a significant uptick in token-level scam activity across multiple blockchain networks. Three critical-severity incidents were identified, including a $3.8M rug pull on BNB Chain, a $1.2M honeypot trap on Ethereum, and a $2.1M presale exit scam with fabricated team identities.
